messages.content: # Here is how to fix the " Driver model is probably missing " error.

## Step 1
> Open steam > library > right click Assetto Corsa > Manage > browse local files

## Step 2
> Open the "content" folder then open the "drivers" folder and identify any folder other than "**driver_skins**" and "**Drivers_oculus**".
> In this case, the extra faulty folder is "**driver_80_B.kn5**"

## Step 3
> Rename the faulty folder to anything, it doesn't matter.
> Then open the freshly renamed folder
> Inside you'll see a .kn5 file. Move it back into the "drivers" folder

## Step 4
> Delete the freshly renamed folder and play on No Hesi servers.
